# Multilevel Analysis

## Authors and Contact

- Maria Seanna Minas (mseaminas.edu\@gmail.com)

- Abigail Pobre (aspobre\@gdoe.net)

- John Christian "JC" Sual (jcsual\@gmail.com)

- Grazyna Badowski

- Zenaida Natividad

## Recommended Order of Codes

1.  Addresses to CDP
2.  Merging Files
3.  Generalized Simple Regression Models
4.  LASSO Regression Analysis and Mixed Regression Models

## Notes

In the codes, anything written in camel case (thisIsAnExampleOfCamelCase) should be replaced with your intended outcomes.
